tasks.subject: Task 0: Extract shared reconcile primitive
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Move `_reconcile_dead_ledger_entries` and helpers to `cli/_reconcile.py` so overview + `_cmd_list` share one impl.

**Files:** Create `src/kinoforge/cli/_reconcile.py`; Modify `src/kinoforge/cli/_commands.py`; Test `tests/cli/test_reconcile_ledger.py`.

**Verify:** `pixi run pytest tests/cli/test_reconcile_ledger.py -v`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/kinoforge/cli/_reconcile.py", "src/kinoforge/cli/_commands.py", "tests/cli/test_reconcile_ledger.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run pytest tests/cli/test_reconcile_ledger.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["helpers moved to cli/_reconcile.py", "_cmd_list output byte-identical", "existing reconcile test passes after import update"], "modelTier": "mechanical"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 1: Age-gated suspect reconcile in instance overview
tasks.description:
**Goal:** `_print_instance_overview` reconciles only suspect rows (`age > max_age_s`) before printing; young/live never probed.

**Files:** Modify `src/kinoforge/cli/_main.py`; Test `tests/cli/test_instance_overview.py`.

**Verify:** `pixi run pytest tests/cli/test_instance_overview.py -v`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/kinoforge/cli/_main.py", "tests/cli/test_instance_overview.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run pytest tests/cli/test_instance_overview.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["young row not probed (resolver uncalled)", "suspect gone row forgotten+dropped", "reconcile failure degrades, no raise", "reuses shared primitive"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Honest est_spend label + offline unverified marker
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Relabel spend as upper-bound estimate; flag surviving suspect rows `⚠ unverified`.

**Files:** Modify `src/kinoforge/cli/_main.py`; Test `tests/cli/test_instance_overview.py`.

**Verify:** `pixi run pytest tests/cli/test_instance_overview.py -v`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/kinoforge/cli/_main.py", "tests/cli/test_instance_overview.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run pytest tests/cli/test_instance_overview.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["spend labelled as upper-bound estimate", "surviving suspect row marked unverified", "young/live row unmarked"], "modelTier": "mechanical"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Source fix — heartbeat forgets on observed pod-death
tasks.description:
**Goal:** HeartbeatLoop forgets + stops when util `probe()` confirms pod absent mid-run.

**Files:** Modify `src/kinoforge/core/reaper.py`, `src/kinoforge/core/heartbeat_loop.py`; Test `tests/core/test_heartbeat_pod_gone.py`.

**Verify:** `pixi run pytest tests/core/test_heartbeat_pod_gone.py -v`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/kinoforge/core/reaper.py", "src/kinoforge/core/heartbeat_loop.py", "tests/core/test_heartbeat_pod_gone.py"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run pytest tests/core/test_heartbeat_pod_gone.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["probe exists=False forgets+cancels+stops", "exists=True no reap", "util_endpoint None no probe", "Verdict.POD_GONE added"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Full-suite + lint/type green, update PROGRESS
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Suite green, lint/type clean, record fix in PROGRESS.

**Files:** Modify `PROGRESS.md`.

**Verify:** `pixi run pre-commit run --all-files`; `pixi run test`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["PROGRESS.md"], "verifyCommand": "pixi run pre-commit run --all-files", "acceptanceCriteria": ["full suite green", "lint+typecheck clean", "pre-commit passes", "PROGRESS snapshot updated"], "modelTier": "mechanical"}
```
